framework.name: Active Directory Security Recommendations
framework.name_nl: Recommandations de securite relatives a Active Directory
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Security hardening recommendations for Active Directory environments
framework.structure_description: Recommendations for AD architecture, tiered administration, privilege management, group policy hardening, monitoring, and recovery.

controls.title: Implement tiered administration model
controls.title_nl: Mettre en oeuvre le modele d'administration en tiers
controls.description: Implement a tiered administration model (Tier 0/1/2) to prevent privilege escalation across AD tiers.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre un modele d'administration en tiers (Tier 0/1/2) pour empecher l'escalade de privileges entre les tiers AD.

controls.title: Secure domain controllers
controls.description: Domain controllers shall be dedicated servers, physically secured, with minimal installed roles and hardened configuration.
controls.description_nl: Les controleurs de domaine doivent etre des serveurs dedies, physiquement securises, avec un minimum de roles installes et une configuration durcie.

controls.title: Restrict Domain Admins membership
controls.description: Minimize membership of Domain Admins and Enterprise Admins groups. Use just-in-time privilege elevation.
controls.description_nl: Minimiser l'appartenance aux groupes Domain Admins et Enterprise Admins. Utiliser l'elevation de privileges juste-a-temps.

controls.title: Protected Users group
controls.description: Add privileged accounts to the Protected Users security group to enforce enhanced credential protection.
controls.description_nl: Ajouter les comptes privilegies au groupe de securite Protected Users pour imposer une protection renforcee des identifiants.

controls.title: Disable NTLM where possible
controls.description: Progressively disable NTLM authentication in favor of Kerberos. Monitor and audit remaining NTLM usage.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver progressivement l'authentification NTLM en faveur de Kerberos. Surveiller et auditer l'utilisation residuelle de NTLM.

controls.title: Enforce Kerberos armoring (FAST)
controls.description: Enable Kerberos FAST (Flexible Authentication Secure Tunneling) for enhanced Kerberos ticket protection.
controls.description_nl: Activer Kerberos FAST (Flexible Authentication Secure Tunneling) pour une protection renforcee des tickets Kerberos.

controls.title: Secure Group Policy Objects
controls.title_nl: Securiser les objets de strategie de groupe
controls.description: Restrict GPO editing permissions, audit GPO changes, and back up GPOs regularly.
controls.description_nl: Restreindre les permissions de modification des GPO, auditer les changements de GPO et sauvegarder regulierement les GPO.

controls.title: Monitor AD replication
controls.description: Monitor AD replication health and alert on replication failures that could indicate compromise or infrastructure issues.
controls.description_nl: Surveiller la sante de la replication AD et alerter sur les echecs de replication qui pourraient indiquer une compromission ou des problemes d'infrastructure.

controls.title: Audit AD changes
controls.description: Enable and monitor advanced auditing for all AD object changes, especially in privileged groups and OUs.
controls.description_nl: Activer et surveiller l'audit avance de tous les changements d'objets AD, en particulier dans les groupes privilegies et les UO.

controls.title: Monitor Kerberoasting and AS-REP roasting
controls.title_nl: Surveiller le Kerberoasting et l'AS-REP roasting
controls.description: Deploy detection rules for Kerberoasting (TGS requests for service accounts) and AS-REP roasting attacks.
controls.description_nl: Deployer des regles de detection pour les attaques Kerberoasting (requetes TGS pour les comptes de service) et AS-REP roasting.

controls.title: AD backup and recovery plan
controls.title_nl: Plan de sauvegarde et recuperation AD
controls.description: Maintain tested AD backup and recovery procedures including authoritative restore and forest recovery scenarios.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des procedures de sauvegarde et recuperation AD testees incluant la restauration autoritative et les scenarios de recuperation de foret.

controls.title: LAPS for local administrator passwords
controls.title_nl: LAPS pour les mots de passe administrateur locaux
controls.description: Deploy LAPS (Local Administrator Password Solution) to manage unique local admin passwords on all domain-joined machines.
controls.description_nl: Deployer LAPS (Local Administrator Password Solution) pour gerer des mots de passe administrateur locaux uniques sur toutes les machines jointes au domaine.

controls.title: Secure AdminSDHolder
controls.description: Monitor and protect the AdminSDHolder object which propagates permissions to protected groups every 60 minutes.
controls.description_nl: Surveiller et proteger l'objet AdminSDHolder qui propage les permissions aux groupes proteges toutes les 60 minutes.

controls.title: Disable legacy protocols
controls.description: Disable LM hash storage, LLMNR, NBT-NS, WPAD, and other legacy protocols that enable credential theft.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver le stockage de hachage LM, LLMNR, NBT-NS, WPAD et autres protocoles anciens qui permettent le vol d'identifiants.
